response.justification: A strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and a genuine open-source/Linux background that fits the digital-sovereignty focus. However, this is an executive leadership role and the resume shows individual-contributor titles with no formal track record of leading teams, technical project management, or client-facing architecture advisory. Two hard requirements are weak or missing: German is only 'Basic' against a minimum C1, and there is no evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/risk/compliance work. The German gap and absence of leadership experience are the decisive limiters.
strengths: Deep, genuine open-source and Linux/Unix experience aligned with the role
Extensive 15+ year polyglot engineering career across many domains
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, courses, and dojos
concerns: German only 'Basic' versus required C1 minimum
No formal leadership, team management, or tech-lead title/track record
No evidence of UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance
